LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronStealthField.description: 啟動機載折射場並短暫地使裝置幾乎無法看到。
LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronStealthField.label: 隱身領域
LanguageData.RobCo_HeavyFlamer.description: 消耗儲存的凝固汽油彈來投射更長、更熱的燃燒彈。
LanguageData.RobCo_HeavyFlamer.label: 重型火焰噴射器
LanguageData.RobCo_LibertyPrimeNukeThrow.description: Hurls a mini-nuke in a high arc.
LanguageData.RobCo_LibertyPrimeNukeThrow.label: 迷你核彈投擲
LanguageData.RobCo_LightFlamer.description: Expends a napalm charge to spray a close-range incendiary burst.
LanguageData.RobCo_LightFlamer.label: 輕型火焰噴射器
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronRocketSalvo.description: 發射三枚火箭彈飽和打擊。
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronRocketSalvo.label: 火箭齊射
